description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a sprawling, single-story layout, surrounded by a low boundary wall and accessed via a driveway. The structure features a combination of white and dark brown exterior finishes, with large rectangular sections and clean, geometric lines. There is a visible outdoor area with a pool and patio, as well as landscaped zones with pathways and seating arrangements. The main entrance is set back from the street, and the property includes multiple large windows, some grouped and others spaced apart, providing ample natural light. The roofline is predominantly flat, with some sections slightly elevated for architectural interest. The overall design emphasizes open space, minimalism, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, white and dark brown finishes, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: From this angle, the driveway, main entrance, and a portion of the pool and patio area are visible, highlighting the bungalow's open layout.
description_view_1: This view shows the full width of the bungalow, the central flat roof, and the arrangement of outdoor spaces, including the pool and seating area.
description_view_2: Here, the pool and patio are more prominent, and the rear sections of the bungalow with grouped windows and landscaping are visible.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the back of the bungalow, the flat roof sections, and the boundary wall along the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
